title: WinTune Profile
description: A tuning profile that references tweaks by ID and may inherit from other profiles.

name.description: Display name for the profile (Gaming, Workstation, Laptop, Minimal).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this profile does.

inherits.description: Parent profile(s) to inherit tweaks from. Child tweaks override parent. Always normalised to array at load time.

oneOf.description: Multiple parent profiles, resolved breadth-first (first = highest priority)

tweaks.description: List of tweak IDs to enable. IDs must match the filenames in src/tweaks/<category>/ (without .ps1).

preserve.description: Tweak IDs to explicitly exclude even if inherited from a parent profile.

dangerous.description: If true, this profile includes tweaks flagged as dangerous. Requires the -Dangerous CLI flag to apply.

then.description: Dangerous profiles must include an explanation.
